name: Grilled Lime Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound the chicken breasts to flatten them.
2. Combine the lime juice, olive oil, chopped green onions, minced garlic, 2 tablespoons of fresh dill, and pepper in a resealable plastic bag.
3. Add the chicken to the bag; seal it, refrigerate for 2 to 4 hours.
4. Drain the chicken and discard the marinade before grilling.
5. Grill the chicken, uncovered, over medium-hot coals for 12 to 15 minutes, until tender and juices run clear. Turn the chicken after 6 minutes.
6. Sprinkle with the remaining dill before serving.
